title: taraxacum espinulosum
intro: Taraxacum espinulosum, also known as the spiny dandelion or prickly dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting liver and kidney function. Taraxacum espinulosum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies.
